def classify_status(raw_status):
    normalized = raw_status.lower()
    if normalized == "active":
        return "ACTIVE"
    elif normalized == "pending":
        return "PENDING"
    elif normalized == "suspended":
        return "SUSPENDED"
    elif normalized == "archived":
        return "ARCHIVED"
    else:
        return "UNKNOWN"


def match_role(raw_role):
    normalized = raw_role.lower()
    if normalized == "admin":
        return 3
    elif normalized == "editor":
        return 2
    elif normalized == "viewer":
        return 1
    return 0
